/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/StanleyCraft.dir/src/main.o CMakeFiles/StanleyCraft.dir/src/Shader.o CMakeFiles/StanleyCraft.dir/src/Window.o CMakeFiles/StanleyCraft.dir/src/Game.o CMakeFiles/StanleyCraft.dir/src/Model.o CMakeFiles/StanleyCraft.dir/lib/glad/src/glad.o -o StanleyCraft   -L/home/stanleya1293/Desktop/Projects/StanleyCraft/build/lib/glfw-3.4/src  -L/home/stanleya1293/Desktop/Projects/StanleyCraft/build/lib/glm/glm  lib/glfw-3.4/src/libglfw3.a lib/glm/glm/libglm.a -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt -Wl,-Bdynamic -lm -ldl
